CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter any additional notes regarding the credit/background check and/or required deposit. Do not put minimim credit score, instead write something like either Rentals: Landlord's target minimum credit score is XXX. SALES: To qualify for a mortgage, applicants typically need a credit score of over 620. or "Landlord has own credit system to check for eligibility. Credit, rental, and employment history are taken into consideration."
CustomField.label: Credit/Background/Deposit Notes
